notes: Concurrency cancels in-progress runs of the same PR.
E2E job caches ~/.cache/ms-playwright by Playwright version + uploads playwright-report/ on completion.

G3_branch_protection.blocker: devin-ai-integration[bot] is not a repo admin -> GitHub API returned 403 'Resource not accessible by integration' on PUT /repos/.../branches/main/protection
G3_branch_protection.workaround: Repo owner (Ilkin-Ibishov) must run scripts/setup-branch-protection.sh with a PAT that has repo-admin scope, or apply via the GitHub UI. Steps in docs/branch-protection.md.
G3_branch_protection.ordering_note: Run the script AFTER this PR's CI has executed at least once on main, otherwise GitHub rejects the required check names as unknown.

G4_e2e_smoke.config: playwright.config.ts (chromium-only, webServer auto-boots `npm run start` in CI / `npm run dev` locally)

tests.name: homepage loads with hero copy and admin link
login page renders email + password fields
product list page renders products grid
tests.reason: Beta's /products page UI not landed yet — unskip and update selectors when ready.

G5_monitoring.reason: Stage marks G5 optional. Sentry + Vercel Analytics need DSN/keys + per-route instrumentation that should be a follow-up PR after sprint 1.1 closes.
next_steps: Install @sentry/nextjs, run `npx @sentry/wizard@latest -i nextjs` (requires SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN + SENTRY_DSN secrets in Vercel + GitHub Actions).
Add @vercel/analytics + @vercel/speed-insights to src/app/layout.tsx; no extra config required since deploy already runs on Vercel.
Wire Sentry release uploads into ci.yml as a post-build step (commits a Sentry release tied to GITHUB_SHA).

blockers.description: G3 requires repo-admin permissions; only Ilkin-Ibishov can apply.
blockers.action: Run scripts/setup-branch-protection.sh with a PAT, or apply UI rules per docs/branch-protection.md.

tech_decisions.decision: Use ESLint flat config (eslint.config.mjs) directly instead of `next lint`.
tech_decisions.reason: Next.js 16 removed the `next lint` command (vercel/next.js#82685). `eslint-config-next/core-web-vitals` and `eslint-config-next/typescript` exposed as flat configs since the same release.

Alpha's seed scripts and Beta's API routes use `any` in 8 spots. Blocking CI on them would prevent gamma from shipping the pipeline. Comment + handoff TODO ensure they get cleaned up before sprint 1.2.

tech_decisions.decision: Wrap admin login in <Suspense> around useSearchParams.
tech_decisions.reason: Next.js 16 fails the static prerender for client components that read useSearchParams without a Suspense boundary (missing-suspense-with-csr-bailout). Refactored alpha's page minimally; behaviour unchanged.

tech_decisions.decision: Add shadcn-style Card and Label components without @radix-ui/react-label.
tech_decisions.reason: Alpha's login page imports them but the components were never landed. Plain React forwardRef versions are functionally identical for the current login form and avoid adding a new runtime dep.

tech_decisions.decision: Playwright runs `next start` in CI (not `next dev`).
tech_decisions.reason: Closer parity with the Vercel preview deployment; faster cold-start once `npm run build` is cached.

notes_for_next_agent: Branch protection is documented but NOT yet active. Until the owner applies it, direct pushes to main are still possible — coordinate via PRs anyway.
Vercel deploys per-PR (preview) and on merge to main (production). The CI workflow does NOT replace Vercel's build; it only validates lint/types/tests before allowing a merge.
Playwright browsers are cached in CI by Playwright version. If you bump @playwright/test the cache key changes and a fresh `playwright install` runs.
When Beta lands the /products page, unskip `tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts` and tighten the selectors (`product-grid` test id is a placeholder).
Alpha/Beta should clean up `any` usage before sprint 1.2 to keep ESLint output noise-free.
